case_title: NIL YUCEL DDS INC. VS. BOSCO SONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,237.00 FILED BY NIL YUCEL DDS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, BOSCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, BOSCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIL YUCEL DDS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SONG, BOSCO $749.60 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $794.60, DEFENDANT CONFIRMS HE RECIEVED $928.00 ON TREATMENT FROM PLAINITIFF. DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE ONLY PAID $518.40 LEAVING $409.60 AS DEFENDANT'S RESPONSIBILITY. DEFENDANT ALSO INCORRECTLY RECEIVED $340.OO FROM PLAINTIFF. THUS DEFENDANT MUST REPAY PLAINTIFF A TOTAL OF $749.60 PLUS $45.00 COURT COSTS FOR A TOTAL OF $794.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIL YUCEL DDS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, BOSCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF NIL YUCEL, DDS INC, REPRESENTED BY NIL YUCEL, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOSCO SONG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NIL YUCEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIL YUCEL DDS INC.
